Curie BSP-specific functions and assembly implementation of setjmp and longjmp for CPU state management.


## Files
- **[curie-bsp-port.c](curie-bsp-port.c.md)**: Implements Curie BSP-specific functions for console output, logging, fatal errors, and time management.
- **[setjmp.S](setjmp.S.md)**: Assembly implementation of setjmp and longjmp functions for saving and restoring CPU state.
